title: Behavior Pickup Items
description: Allows the mob to pick up items on the ground.

goal_radius.description: Distance in blocks at which the entity is considered to have reached the item.

max_dist.description: Maximum distance in blocks at which the entity will look for items.

speed_multiplier.description: Movement speed multiplier while moving towards items.

track_target.description: Whether the entity tracks its target when out of sight.
